translations.es: La materia de matemáticas es difícil.
translations.fr: Les maths sont une matière difficile.
translations.it: La matematica è una materia difficile.
translations.zh-Hans: 数学是一门很难的学科。
translations.yue: 數學係一門好難嘅科目。
translations.id: Matematika itu mata pelajaran yang sulit.
translations.ja: 数学は難しい科目です。

tokens.explanation: Nominative singular noun; subject of the clause; here a school subject (colloquial for Mathematik).
Finite 3rd person singular present copula linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article; nominative singular neuter determiner of the predicate nominal.
Attributive adjective agreeing with neuter singular 'Fach' (mixed inflection).
Predicate nominal (nominative singular neuter); here meaning a school subject.

sentences.target: Das Brot liegt im zweiten Fach.

translations.de: Das Brot liegt im zweiten Fach.
translations.en: The bread is in the second compartment.
translations.es: El pan está en el segundo estante.
translations.fr: Le pain est sur la deuxième étagère.
translations.it: Il pane è sul secondo ripiano.
translations.pt: O pão está na segunda prateleira.
translations.vi: Bánh mì ở ngăn thứ hai.
translations.nl: Het brood ligt op de tweede plank.
translations.hu: A kenyér a második polcon van.
translations.el: Το ψωμί είναι στο δεύτερο ράφι.
translations.nb: Brødet ligger på den andre hylla.
translations.ro: Pâinea este pe raftul al doilea.
translations.da: Brødet ligger på den anden hylde.
translations.ja: パンは二段目にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular neuter for 'Brot'.
Nominative singular neuter noun; subject of the clause.
Finite 3rd person singular present; intransitive verb meaning 'to lie/be located'.
Fused preposition+definite article ('in dem'); governs dative NP.
Attributive ordinal adjective; dative singular neuter agreeing with 'Fach'.
Object of the preposition 'im'; dative singular neuter; here meaning a compartment/shelf.

sentences.target: Ich stelle die Tassen ins obere Fach.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə diː ˈtasən ɪns ˈoːbəʁə fax./

translations.de: Ich stelle die Tassen ins obere Fach.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə diː ˈtasən ɪns ˈoːbəʁə fax./
translations.en: I'm putting the cups into the top compartment.
translations.es: Pongo las tazas en el estante de arriba.
translations.fr: Je mets les tasses sur l'étagère du haut.
translations.it: Metto le tazze sul ripiano in alto.
translations.ko: 컵을 맨 위 칸에 놓고 있어요.
translations.ru: Я ставлю чашки на верхнюю полку.
translations.pt: Estou colocando as xícaras na prateleira de cima.
translations.he: אני שם את הכוסות במדף העליון.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt các tách lên ngăn trên cùng.
translations.nl: Ik zet de kopjes op de bovenste plank.
translations.uk: Я ставлю чашки на верхню полицю.
translations.hu: A csészéket a felső polcra teszem.
translations.hi: मैं कप ऊपर वाली शेल्फ़ पर रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω τις κούπες στο πάνω ράφι.
translations.nb: Jeg setter koppene på øverste hylle.
translations.id: Saya menaruh cangkir di rak paling atas.
translations.sv: Jag ställer kopparna på översta hyllan.
translations.ro: Pun ceștile pe raftul de sus.
translations.da: Jeg sætter kopperne på øverste hylde.
translations.ja: カップを一番上の棚に置いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite 1st person singular present; transitive verb meaning 'to put/place'.
Definite article; accusative plural for 'Tassen'.
Direct object; accusative plural.
Fused preposition+definite article ('in das'); directional use governing accusative.
Attributive adjective; accusative singular neuter (weak inflection) modifying 'Fach'.
Object of the preposition 'ins'; accusative singular neuter.

sentences.target: Sie wechselt das Fach im zweiten Semester.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈvɛksəlt das fax ɪm ˈtsvaɪ̯tən zeˈmɛstɐ./

translations.de: Sie wechselt das Fach im zweiten Semester.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈvɛksəlt das fax ɪm ˈtsvaɪ̯tən zeˈmɛstɐ./
translations.en: She is changing her subject in the second semester.
translations.es: Va a cambiar de carrera en el segundo semestre.
translations.fr: Elle change de filière au deuxième semestre.
translations.it: Cambia corso di studi nel secondo semestre.
translations.ru: Она меняет специальность во втором семестре.
translations.pt: Ela vai trocar de curso no segundo semestre.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đổi chuyên ngành vào học kỳ thứ hai.
translations.ar: تغيّر تخصصها في الفصل الدراسي الثاني.
translations.nl: Ze verandert van studie in het tweede semester.
translations.uk: Вона змінює спеціальність у другому семестрі.
translations.hi: वह दूसरे सेमेस्टर में अपना विषय बदल रही है.
translations.pl: Ona zmienia kierunek w drugim semestrze.
translations.nb: Hun bytter studieprogram i andre semester.
translations.id: Dia ganti jurusan pada semester kedua.
translations.sv: Hon byter inriktning under andra terminen.
translations.ro: Își schimbă specializarea în al doilea semestru.
translations.da: Hun skifter studie på andet semester.
translations.ja: 彼女は2学期に専攻を変えます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite 3rd person singular present; transitive verb meaning 'to change/switch'.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter for 'Fach'.
Direct object; accusative singular neuter; here meaning field of study/major.
Fused preposition+definite article ('in dem'); governs dative NP.
Attributive ordinal adjective; dative singular neuter agreeing with 'Semester'.
Object of the preposition 'im'; dative singular neuter.
